## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Dimmo and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, product pages, and SEO performance.](https://fathom.video/share/f3e5zpTQUeyx_ac8H3huY_nF9mT_kjDR?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [New product page template approved with short summaries and "Read More" functionality](https://fathom.video/share/f3e5zpTQUeyx_ac8H3huY_nF9mT_kjDR?tab=summary&timestamp=13.0)
  - [Title tag optimization for product pages decided: "Watch Instant Demo + All You Need to Decide"](https://fathom.video/share/f3e5zpTQUeyx_ac8H3huY_nF9mT_kjDR?tab=summary&timestamp=77.0)
  - [Internal linking strategy developed for product pages to improve SEO](https://fathom.video/share/f3e5zpTQUeyx_ac8H3huY_nF9mT_kjDR?tab=summary&timestamp=99.0)
  - [Early SEO results show 25 keywords ranking in top 10 positions for recently published pages](https://fathom.video/share/f3e5zpTQUeyx_ac8H3huY_nF9mT_kjDR?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)

## Topics

### Product Page Template and Content Structure

  - [Short summary approved for initial view, with "Read More" option for full details](https://fathom.video/share/f3e5zpTQUeyx_ac8H3huY_nF9mT_kjDR?tab=summary&timestamp=13.0)
  - [Content structure: Features → Integrations → User Reviews](https://fathom.video/share/f3e5zpTQUeyx_ac8H3huY_nF9mT_kjDR?tab=summary&timestamp=99.0)
  - [Lucas to implement "Read More" functionality by the weekend](https://fathom.video/share/f3e5zpTQUeyx_ac8H3huY_nF9mT_kjDR?tab=summary&timestamp=242.0)
  - [Prateek requested screenshots of CMS publishing process for different sections](https://fathom.video/share/f3e5zpTQUeyx_ac8H3huY_nF9mT_kjDR?tab=summary&timestamp=248.0)

### Title Tag Optimization for Product Pages

  - [11 title tag templates proposed to optimize click-through rates](https://fathom.video/share/f3e5zpTQUeyx_ac8H3huY_nF9mT_kjDR?tab=summary&timestamp=343.0)
  - [Decided on "Watch Instant Demo + All You Need to Decide" after discussion](https://fathom.video/share/f3e5zpTQUeyx_ac8H3huY_nF9mT_kjDR?tab=summary&timestamp=570.0)
  - [Will implement across \~500 product pages without A/B testing due to low traffic volume](https://fathom.video/share/f3e5zpTQUeyx_ac8H3huY_nF9mT_kjDR?tab=summary&timestamp=570.0)

### Internal Linking Strategy

  - [Two-section approach for product pages:](https://fathom.video/share/f3e5zpTQUeyx_ac8H3huY_nF9mT_kjDR?tab=summary&timestamp=1227.0)
    1.  Links to all articles about the specific product (e.g., features, alternatives)
    2.  Links to related category articles (e.g., other software reviews)
  - [Aims to improve internal linking and SEO performance](https://fathom.video/share/f3e5zpTQUeyx_ac8H3huY_nF9mT_kjDR?tab=summary&timestamp=1227.0)

### SEO Performance Update

  - [7 recently published pages analyzed](https://fathom.video/share/f3e5zpTQUeyx_ac8H3huY_nF9mT_kjDR?tab=summary&timestamp=1900.0)
  - [25 keywords ranking in top 10 positions](https://fathom.video/share/f3e5zpTQUeyx_ac8H3huY_nF9mT_kjDR?tab=summary&timestamp=1928.0)
  - [Notable rankings:](https://fathom.video/share/f3e5zpTQUeyx_ac8H3huY_nF9mT_kjDR?tab=summary&timestamp=1935.0)
      - "Maximizer features" at \#2
      - "Channel sales management software" at \#3
      - "Lucid features" at \#4

### Google Search Analytics Insight

  - [Google uses search page analytics, not on-site analytics, for ranking factors](https://fathom.video/share/f3e5zpTQUeyx_ac8H3huY_nF9mT_kjDR?tab=summary&timestamp=1981.0)
  - [User behavior on search results page (e.g., returning to results) influences rankings](https://fathom.video/share/f3e5zpTQUeyx_ac8H3huY_nF9mT_kjDR?tab=summary&timestamp=1981.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Prateek to implement new title tag format across product pages](https://fathom.video/share/f3e5zpTQUeyx_ac8H3huY_nF9mT_kjDR?tab=summary&timestamp=1900.0)
  - [Lucas to provide screenshots of CMS publishing process](https://fathom.video/share/f3e5zpTQUeyx_ac8H3huY_nF9mT_kjDR?tab=summary&timestamp=319.0)
  - [Implement internal linking strategy on product pages](https://fathom.video/share/f3e5zpTQUeyx_ac8H3huY_nF9mT_kjDR?tab=summary&timestamp=1227.0)
  - [Continue monitoring SEO performance of newly published content](https://fathom.video/share/f3e5zpTQUeyx_ac8H3huY_nF9mT_kjDR?tab=summary&timestamp=1900.0)
  - [Reconnect next week for follow-up on progress](https://fathom.video/share/f3e5zpTQUeyx_ac8H3huY_nF9mT_kjDR?tab=summary&timestamp=1040.0)
